feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP in Eclipse logon requesting credentials repeatedly
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am experiencing a persistent login loop when trying to use ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse.

The Issue:

When Eclipse triggers the logon prompt, it redirects me to the browser. However, the logon page refuses to sign me in. When I enter my username and password, the page simply refreshes without logging me in.

What I have observed:

  • If I try to log in using my username, I receive the error:
    "We couldn't authenticate you."

  • However, if I log in using my email address with the same password, it works successfully.

  • This setup was working perfectly until today. Previously, I was not prompted for browser login at all.

Steps already taken:

  1. Cleared browser cache and cookies.

  2. Reset SAP password.

  3. Tried different browsers.

Despite these steps, the issue persists in Eclipse. It seems like the ADT logon window is rejecting the credentials or failing the authentication handshake.

Has anyone encountered this recently in ADT?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Accessing fields in RAP app controller using OData (V4)
entry.content:
Hi Developers,

Sorry if this is an easy one but I have not done this before so I am a bit stuck.

I have made a RAP application using Eclipse and Business Application Studio. I am generating a Fiori List Report using OData V4 and the data is passing through fine.

I now want to customise the header using an extension point. I have also completed this with static text as seen below.

 


The problem is, I want to be able to display the data that is in the list but in the header instead where I can perform calculations.

For example let's say the list shows multiple entries of employees and a field is the number of days left of annual leave. In the header I want to be able to calculate and display the total number of days of annual leave remaining for all employees.

I have currently setup a controller and I'm attempting to try and get the data in section from the hook

onAfterRendering. I have explored developer tools but I cant seem to find anything.
 
If you know how to do this, please add as much detail as you can.
 
Thank you very much!
OData 
#

entry.title: Can't create package in ZLOCAL in shared instance SAP BTP Free Trail
entry.content:
Ignore the question - I found solution, I just have updated my ADT tool to last version and issue is gone.

Hi, Colleagues,

I have just executed booster 'Prepare Account for ABAP Trail' and logged into system via Eclipse. I can't create subpackage under ZLOCAL.  The button 'Finish' is disabled and when I try to hit the button 'Next', I just stay on the same screen and no errors are got. 

Trail in US region:

I see others packages are adding, but I can't create. Any help, colleagues?

entry.title: custom field value is not updating in "Manage sales order" Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am using SAP S4 hana 2023 on-prem system. I have created one custom filed "Comments" in standard Fiori app "Manage Sales Order version 2" using custom field Fiori app.
Now my requirement is when user will update value in "Comments" field of 1st line item, then same value will be update in "Comments" field of second line item.

I have tried with Badi SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM, but its only updating 1st line item, not 2nd one.

I have also tried with extend BDEF I_SALESORDERTP, but in R_SalesOrderItemTP is not allowing to add determination on custom filed "Comments".


Can you please help me on this how to solve ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT error raising when Click Send Mail action but Mail can send
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have implemented a custom RAP action sendMail for business object ZI_PACKINGLISTAPP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The logic is written in a custom class under Source Code Library and is executed from the RAP behavior. The action reads selected records using READ ENTITIES, creates an email using CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE, sets recipient, subject, and HTML body, and then sends the email using lo_mail->send(). However, when the action is triggered from the Fiori app, the OData request fails with runtime error BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT althouthg the email is  sent. We would like to understand why this logic is not working in the RAP context and which part of the implementation is considered illegal by the RAP framework.

 

Below is the implemented logic for reference:

METHOD sendMail.
  READ ENTITIES OF zi_packinglistapp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY PackingListApp
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_results).

  LOOP AT lt_results ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_result>).
    DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
    lo_mail->add_recipient( 'xxx@company.com' ).
    lo_mail->set_subject( 'Status Updated' ).
    lo_mail->set_main(
      cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
        iv_content = 'Notice Item ' &&
<fs_result>-OutboundDeliveryID &&  ' updated. '
        iv_content_type = 'text/html'
      )
    ).
    lo_mail->send( ).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDMETHOD.

Please clarify why this implementation results in BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT in S/4HANA Public Cloud RAP, and advise the correct SAP-recommended approach for sending emails (and adding attachments) triggered from a RAP action.

Thanks

entry.title: Creating Number Range Objects in SAP BTP Trial Account?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m currently working in an SAP BTP Trial Account and I need to create and manage Number Range Objects for my application.

In on-premise SAP systems (like S/4HANA or ECC), we typically use transactions such as SNRO to create number range objects. However, I’m unsure how this is handled in the SAP BTP Trial environment.

Specifically, I would like to understand:

  • Is it possible to create Number Range Objects directly in SAP BTP Trial?

  • Are there any trial account limitations?

     

    Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: GOS Attachment in RAP Object Page
entry.content:
I have a requirement to display attachments, attached to GOS in Purchase Order Business Object.

Need to retrieve attachments from GOS and display in RAP application and have a clickable link which will display or download the attachment.

Is it possible or not using RAP managed or Unmanaged?

entry.title: Archiving strategy for CDS-based AFO reports in S/4HANA
entry.content:
In our ECC landscape, we have  implemented an archiving solution using a custom utility class and ZARIX tables based on Info Structures to support reporting and meet performance requirements.

With the transition to S/4HANA, our reporting is now based on Analysis for Office (AFO) using CDS views. 

What approaches are you using for archiving or data aging for data consumed by CDS views? How do you enable access to historical or archived data in AFO reports within S/4HANA?

We would greatly appreciate insights and experiences from the community regarding practical and scalable solutions in S/4HANA environments.

Thank you in advance for sharing your knowledge and recommendations.

entry.title: CPI should call a report (with Selection-Screen) in S/4.How to make it a RAP ABAP Object.
entry.content:
A report (with Selection-Screen) needs to be called by CPI, how to achieve the same using RAP ABAP (I'm new to the Language). I can make the report being called in Class using SUBMIT and using AI figured the class can be called in CDS Entity.

Can someone refer me to a document, which can make me achieve the object.

People can use a simple example to explain the process.

entry.title: Service Definition based on Consumption CDS View (BOPF-Based CDS View)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am curious if it is possible to create a Service Definition based on the BOPF-based consumption CDS View? This would be theoretically an easier way to create and publish OData V2 or V4 services in SAP, but still not replacing all the backbone from the old programming mode for SAP Fiori to ABAP Restful Programming Model (RAP).

I tried this on an SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS00 system and the service definition and service binding could be created and activated without any problems, but later one when checking the metadata of the new OData V4 service I am receiving some strange issues regarding a quantity field and its unit of measure

Unit code property 'DAIRYDELIVPROPOSALBASEQTY' not found in complex type 'CT_B93A2928B399FBCED4EC7994740'

it is quite strange since for me the related annotations are properly defined in the consumption CDS View.

Is anyone tried this out and maybe could confirm if this is working or not?

Many thanks,
Catalin

entry.title: RAP unmanaged Excel Upload
entry.content:
Hi Folks,
         i want to create a RAP Object to upload data using excel to CK74N and i don't want to create a draft table  for Unmanage scenario . Please let me know is there any other way where i can leverage RAP concepts to create a Upload action  without creating any draft and persistence table in the Behavior Definition

entry.title: Any way to determine whether its a CREATE or EDIT operation inside a RAP dynamic Feature Instance
entry.content:
I am having a custom RAP BO Draft enabled Managed application having SalesOrder Header and Composition Sales Item Child.

I have implemented one dynamic feature instance for quantity field (KWMENG) of Item view

field( features : instance ) KWMENG;

Inside the method get_instance_features, I have implemented the logic to make the qty field in the item table as read only which is working perfectly fine

Now what i want is , if the above feature instance is called during CREATE , then I want to skip the logic of making this field read only and if its called using EDIT button , then i want the logic to be applied.

So basically, I need a way to identify inside get_instance_features, whether this method is triggered from CREATE or EDIT button? Can someone kindly help in understanding how to identify this ?

Below is my code for feature instance for disabling the Qty field works fine (but in both CREATE and EDIT operation)

METHOD get_instance_features.
     DATA: lv_str type string.

     lv_str = 'ABC'.

     if requested_features-%field-kwmeng = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
       "Reading records for selected Key fields
       READ entities of ZR_Sales_Header in local mode
         entity ZS_Header
         fields ( vbeln gbstk )
         with corresponding #( keys )
         result DATA(lt_res_hdr)

         entity ZS_Header by \_SalesOrdItem
         fields ( vbeln posnr kwmeng )
         with corresponding #( keys )
         result DATA(lt_res_itm)
         failed DATA(lt_failed).

       TRY.
         "Fetching the order status from the sales order header (Using 1st record from item table
         "as all items will have same header status
         "DATA(lv_ord_status) = lt_res_hdr[ %tky = lt_res_itm[ 1 ]-%tky-vbeln ]-%data-gbstk.
          DATA(lv_ord_status) = lt_res_hdr[ %tky = lt_res_itm[ 1 ]-%tky ]-%data-gbstk.

        CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
         clear lv_ord_status.
       ENDTRY.

       "If order status is not completed
        if lv_ord_status <> 'C'.

           "Fetching alternate line items of order if status is not completed
           result = VALUE #( for ls_res_item in lt_res_itm  
                              ( %tky = ls_res_item-%tky
                                %field-kwmeng = if_abap_behv=>FC-f-read_only            )
                           ).
        endif.
     endif.
  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: UI Annotation to change field label dynamically in ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a Fiori APP using ABAP RAP framework. I need to set the label text of an input field dynamically as the short text of the MIC maintained in the master. I have written the below code in Metadata Extension, but the text is not changing dynamically. The label is currently coming from the custom data element which the field is linked to. 

 

@ui:{ fieldGroup: [{ qualifier: 'tqQualityDetails' , position: 10 } ],

hidden: #(hideHectolitreWeight) }

@Consumption.dynamicLabel: {

label: '&1',

binding: [{

index: 1,

// parameter: '',

element: 'txtHectolitreWeight',

// replaceWith: #LOW,

format:#TEXT

// offset: 0,

// length: 40

}]

}

HectolitreWeight;

 

Any help in this regard would be very much helpful.

Thanks,

Vinod Iyer

entry.title: SAP REST API – SICF service active but Postman returns 404 “No suitable resource found”
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to build a custom REST API in ABAP. i have created HANDLER,PROVIDER & SICG SERVICE.

i got this message: 

404 Not Found No suitable resource found
Also, my external breakpoint in the provider class is not triggered.

entry.title: Modfiy Entities EML for creating records of only child entitiy does not work
entry.content:
This is regarding using standard RAP BO R_FunctionalLocationTP to create records in my se38 regular abap program.

The scenario is that already functional location exists in the standard db table IFLOT (W335-101HB-A001-S4) . But i want to create a class type as 0003 which is a child/associated entity of the RAP BO using EML in my SE38 program.

data: lt_floc_class type table for create r_functionallocationtp\_classification,
          lt_floc_class_char type table for create R_FuncnlLocClfnClassTP\_characteristic.

    lt_floc_class = value #( ( FunctionalLocation = 'W335-101HB-A001-S4'

                               %target = value #( (
                                                    FunctionalLocation = 'W335-101HB-A001-S4'
                                                     "ClassInternalID = ''
                                                     ClassType = '003'
                                                     "ChangeNumber = ''
                                                     %control-ClassType = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                      ) )

                           ) ).

    modify "entities of r_functionallocationtp
      entity R_FunctionalLocationTP
      create by \_classification
      auto fill cid with lt_floc_class
       mapped data(ls_mapped)
       failed data(ls_failed)
       reported data(ls_reported).

    commit entities
     response of R_FunctionalLocationTP
     failed final(lt_commit_failed)
     reported final(lt_commit_reported).

The above code is not creating the class type in KSSK table/IL03 table and in debugging there is no record in failed itab so I am not able to identify where is the issue.

entry.title: How to pass longtext via extraction enable CDS to Datasphere
entry.content:
I need to pass longtext in datasphere using extraction enabled CDS. However, neither longtext nor table functions can be used for it.
Could you please to identify the best way to do it.

Regards,
Malika Bathla.

SAP Datasphere SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: ABAP Restful, annotation for navigaton with condition
entry.content:
Dear all,

when annotating a CDS view for intent-based navigation, is it possible to use semantic object and semantic object action based on a condition?

Example: the CDS view has a field "SalesDocument" and another field with the "SalesDocumentType" (e.g. order or contract) . Is it possible to annotate the CDS view in a way that by clicking on  "SalesDocument" the corresponding app will be called depending on the document type (order -> display order app, contract -> display contract app)?

Thanks,

entry.title: High importance flag in outlook from ABAP for email using SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API
entry.content: I have a requirement to show high importance flag in outlook which means showing red exclamation in  the outlook mail. In my abap code we are using SO_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1 , we have tried to set the priority in document_data  even then we didn't receive the high priority email with red exclamation in the email. How can i find solution for this?

entry.title: I want to Create a REST Data Entity using BTP Destination. but unable retrieve expected output.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to create a REST Data Entity from my build apps workspace for 'API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV' (/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/) odata service.

I have a BTP destination already configured.

1.Adding BTP Destination in Base section2. adding odata path in the retrieve section3.Test the data entity. got200

4.But not receiving the expected databut when I am retrieving data I am getting below result, it returns status -200. which is OK.

 

But I am not at all expecting this response. It is returning bunch of standard available catalog details. so something is wrong here.

 

Can someone please guide me what is going wrong here.

Is there any specific way I should configure my BTP Destination?

entry.title: Released API for F-07 / FB01 / F-44 equivalent posting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently migrating a custom ECC ABAP report (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) framework as
a Managed Business Object with Draft.

In ECC, the report posted FI entries using BDC recordings for the following
transactions:

- F-06 → Incoming Customer Payment
- F-07 → Outgoing Vendor Payment
- FB01 → Manual GL Document Posting
- F-44 → Vendor Special GL Clearing (Indicator K)

Since BDC is NOT permitted in Public Cloud, I have been searching for the
equivalent released APIs.


✅ RESOLVED — F-06:
I found and implemented CCPAPI_CUSTOMER_PAYMENT_SRV (Communication Scenario
SAP_COM_0276) via OData HTTP POST. This works correctly.


❌ STILL BLOCKED — F-07, FB01, F-44:

► F-07 (Outgoing Payment):
- API_PAYMENT_INITIATION_SRV → Scope mismatch. Covers payment orders,
not direct FI document posting
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Error: "The operation CREATE is not activated
for entity I_JOURNALENTRYTP"

► FB01 (Manual GL Posting):
- Same BAPI blocked as above
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Same CREATE not activated error
- No generic GL document posting API found on SAP API Business Hub

► F-44 (Vendor Special GL Clearing):
- I_JournalEntryTP EML with SpecialGLIndicator field → Same CREATE
not activated error
- Factoring Clearing SOAP API → FI-CA module only, not applicable for FI-AP
- No AP account clearing API found


My Questions:
─────────────
1. What is the correct released API / RAP Business Object to post an
outgoing payment (F-07 equivalent) in Public Cloud?

2. What is the correct API for posting a manual GL document (FB01 equivalent)
programmatically from a RAP behavior class?

3. What is the correct API for clearing a vendor special GL indicator K item
(F-44 equivalent)?

4. Is I_JournalEntryTP the correct Business Object for all of these? If yes,
why is the CREATE operation not activated and how can it be enabled?

5. Is there a Communication Scenario that needs to be set up for
I_JournalEntryTP to work via EML?


Technical Context:
──────────────────
- Development: RAP Managed BO, ABAP for Cloud (Tier 1)
- Root BO: ZI_FI_BRS_STATEMENT (based on I_JournalEntryItem)
- Action: PostBRSItems inside behavior class zbp_i_fi_brs_statement
- System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Already tried: MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_JournalEntryTP with COMMIT ENTITIES

Any guidance, SAP Notes, KBA references, or working code examples would be
greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!
